The following events took place in approximately '''35,000''' '''[[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]], based on the planet of [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]], is formed. {{Circa}}<ref name="CSWE" />
